subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses MongoDB collection to retrieve all active Adobe contracts grouped by product line, extracting current SKU, quantity, renewal date, and license cost
Query consumption_facts SQL warehouse to calculate Q4 2024 actual spend and 90-day rolling usage trend by Adobe product line, including spend per unit and growth rate

Reconcile contracted state from sam_licenses with Q4 spend and 90-day usage trend from consumption_facts. Classify each product line renewal posture (expand/hold/reduce) based on utilization gap, spend velocity, and trend direction. Generate renewal recommendations with rationale

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks with minimum necessary decomposition: (1) MongoDB query for current licensed state is straightforward single-collection retrieval (small). (2) SQL spend and trend analysis requires multi-period aggregation with window functions for 90-day rolling calcs, warranting mid tier. (3) Cross-recon reconciles two sources (sam_licenses state vs. consumption_facts actuals), performs posture classification and recommendation generation—high complexity inferencing justifies frontier tier. No policy_action needed because renewal recommendations are part of the cross_recon reconciliation logic, not a separate governance evaluation."

output.raw_output: {"sql": "WITH q4_spend AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS q4_2024_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS q4_2024_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product), rolling_90 AS (SELECT product, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-03' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS last_90d_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-05' AND event_date < '2024-10-03' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS prior_90d_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-03' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS last_90d_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-05' AND event_date < '2024-10-03' THEN daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS prior_90d_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-07-05' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product) SELECT q.product, q.q4_2024_spend, q.q4_2024_seats, CASE WHEN q.q4_2024_seats > 0 THEN q.q4_2024_spend / q.q4_2024_seats ELSE NULL END AS spend_per_seat, r.last_90d_spend, r.prior_90d_spend, CASE WHEN r.prior_90d_spend > 0 THEN (r.last_90d_spend - r.prior_90d_spend) / r.prior_90d_spend ELSE NULL END AS spend_growth_rate, r.last_90d_seats, r.prior_90d_seats, CASE WHEN r.prior_90d_seats > 0 THEN (r.last_90d_seats - r.prior_90d_seats)::NUMERIC / r.prior_90d_seats ELSE NULL END AS seat_growth_rate FROM q4_spend q LEFT JOIN rolling_90 r ON q.product = r.product ORDER BY
